summary: 10k Science has public evidence of strong student engagement and evidence of promise for learning. Public materials describe a 137-student pilot, 22 of 28 students preferring VR over reading or video, +15% content knowledge gains, 78% student engagement, a Stevens pilot where over 92% of undergraduates said the experience enhanced learning, and a 60+ educator survey identifying time, engagement, funding, feedback, and motivation challenges.
